options.text: INSERT INTO `applications` (`id`, `avatarurl`, `userid`, `username`, `type`, `q1`, `q2`, `q3`, `q4`, `q5`, `q6`, `q7`, `q8`, `q9`, `q10`, `status`) VALUES (NULL, '${text1}', '${text2}', '${text3}', '${text4}', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, '0')
You already have an open application. Please be patient, our staff will look at it as soon as possible.

Welcome to the plural alliance application.
Click the dropdown menu and click one of the applications.

Please read the rules before filling out the application.
Staff of the Plural Alliance appreciates your patience.

Before filling out the application please read the rules for the server password, please do not provide us your personal password, if you provide us any passwords that is not the server password we will @ you in waiting-hall.

options.text: UPDATE `taskqueue` SET `finished` = '1', `result` = 'Running Sync takes longer than 1 minute. Please wait.' WHERE `taskqueue`.`ID` = ${text1};
UPDATE `taskqueue` SET `finished` = '1', `result` = 'Error: Set type does not exist', `timestamp_finished` = '${text2}' WHERE `taskqueue`.`ID` = ${text1};

options.title: Bump time!
options.description: It's time to Bump the server! If you want to Bump the server pls do /bump.

options.text: Thank you! for Bumping The Plural Alliance, If you are able too leave a review on Disboard we would be ever so grateful ❤️
